lines.english: Lesson 8
lines.chinese: 第8课
lines.raw: Lesson 8 | 第8课

lines.english: A famous monastery
lines.chinese: 一座著名的修道院
lines.raw: A famous monastery | 一座著名的修道院

lines.english: What are the St.Bernard dogs used for?
lines.chinese: 圣伯纳狗是用来做什么的？
lines.raw: What are the St.Bernard dogs used for? | 圣伯纳狗是用来做什么的？

lines.english: The Great St.Bernard Pass connects Switzerland to Italy.
lines.chinese: 大圣伯纳山口连接着瑞士和意大利。
lines.raw: The Great St.Bernard Pass connects Switzerland to Italy. | 大圣伯纳山口连接着瑞士和意大利。

lines.english: At 2,473 metres, it is the highest mountain pass in Europe.
lines.chinese: 它海拔2473米，是欧洲最高的山口。
lines.raw: At 2,473 metres, it is the highest mountain pass in Europe. | 它海拔2473米，是欧洲最高的山口。

lines.english: The famous monastery of St.Bernard,
lines.chinese: 著名的圣伯纳修道院，
lines.raw: The famous monastery of St.Bernard, | 著名的圣伯纳修道院，

lines.english: which was founded in the eleventh century, lies about a mile away.
lines.chinese: 建立于11世纪，距此约一英里。
lines.raw: which was founded in the eleventh century, lies about a mile away. | 建立于11世纪，距此约一英里。

lines.english: For hundreds of years, St.Bernard dogs have saved the lives of travellers crossing the dangerous Pass.
lines.chinese: 数百年来，圣伯纳狗一直在拯救穿越这个危险山口的旅行者的生命。
lines.raw: For hundreds of years, St.Bernard dogs have saved the lives of travellers crossing the dangerous Pass. | 数百年来，圣伯纳狗一直在拯救穿越这个危险山口的旅行者的生命。

lines.english: These friendly dogs, which were first brought from Asia,
lines.chinese: 这些友善的狗，最初从亚洲引进，
lines.raw: These friendly dogs, which were first brought from Asia, | 这些友善的狗，最初从亚洲引进，

lines.english: were used as watchdogs even in Roman times.
lines.chinese: 甚至在罗马时代就被用作看门狗。
lines.raw: were used as watchdogs even in Roman times. | 甚至在罗马时代就被用作看门狗。

lines.english: Now that a tunnel has been built through the mountains, the Pass is less dangerous,
lines.chinese: 如今，随着一条穿山隧道的建成，这个山口不再那么危险了，
lines.raw: Now that a tunnel has been built through the mountains, the Pass is less dangerous, | 如今，随着一条穿山隧道的建成，这个山口不再那么危险了，

lines.english: but each year, the dogs are still sent out into the snow whenever a traveller is in difficulty.
lines.chinese: 但是每年，只要有旅行者遇到困难，这些狗仍然会被派出去在雪地里搜救。
lines.raw: but each year, the dogs are still sent out into the snow whenever a traveller is in difficulty. | 但是每年，只要有旅行者遇到困难，这些狗仍然会被派出去在雪地里搜救。

lines.english: Despite the new tunnel,
lines.chinese: 尽管有了新隧道，
lines.raw: Despite the new tunnel, | 尽管有了新隧道，

lines.english: there are still a few people who rashly attempt to cross the Pass on foot.
lines.chinese: 仍然有一些人冒险徒步穿越山口。
lines.raw: there are still a few people who rashly attempt to cross the Pass on foot. | 仍然有一些人冒险徒步穿越山口。

lines.english: During the summer months, the monastery is very busy,
lines.chinese: 在夏季，修道院非常繁忙，
lines.raw: During the summer months, the monastery is very busy, | 在夏季，修道院非常繁忙，

lines.english: for it is visited by thousands of people who cross the Pass in cars.
lines.chinese: 因为成千上万驾车穿越山口的人会来这里参观。
lines.raw: for it is visited by thousands of people who cross the Pass in cars. | 因为成千上万驾车穿越山口的人会来这里参观。

lines.english: As there are so many people about, the dogs have to be kept in a special enclosure.
lines.chinese: 由于人太多，狗必须被关在一个特殊的围栏里。
lines.raw: As there are so many people about, the dogs have to be kept in a special enclosure. | 由于人太多，狗必须被关在一个特殊的围栏里。

lines.english: In winter, however, life at the monastery is quite different.
lines.chinese: 然而，在冬天，修道院的生活则截然不同。
lines.raw: In winter, however, life at the monastery is quite different. | 然而，在冬天，修道院的生活则截然不同。

lines.english: The temperature drops to -30 degrees,
lines.chinese: 气温降至零下30度，
lines.raw: The temperature drops to -30 degrees, | 气温降至零下30度，

lines.english: and very few people attempt to cross the Pass.
lines.chinese: 很少有人尝试穿越山口。
lines.raw: and very few people attempt to cross the Pass. | 很少有人尝试穿越山口。

lines.english: The monks prefer winter to summer for they have more privacy.
lines.chinese: 僧侣们更喜欢冬天而不是夏天，因为他们有更多的隐私。
lines.raw: The monks prefer winter to summer for they have more privacy. | 僧侣们更喜欢冬天而不是夏天，因为他们有更多的隐私。

lines.english: The dogs have greater freedom, too,
lines.chinese: 狗也有更大的自由，
lines.raw: The dogs have greater freedom, too, | 狗也有更大的自由，

lines.english: for they are allowed to wander outside their enclosure.
lines.chinese: 因为它们被允许在围栏外自由漫步。
lines.raw: for they are allowed to wander outside their enclosure. | 因为它们被允许在围栏外自由漫步。

lines.english: The only regular visitors to the monastery in winter are parties of skiers who go there at Christmas and Easter.
lines.chinese: 冬季修道院唯一的常客是圣诞节和复活节前往那里的滑雪者们。
lines.raw: The only regular visitors to the monastery in winter are parties of skiers who go there at Christmas and Easter. | 冬季修道院唯一的常客是圣诞节和复活节前往那里的滑雪者们。

lines.english: These young people,
lines.chinese: 这些年轻人，
lines.raw: These young people, | 这些年轻人，

lines.english: who love the peace of the mountains,
lines.chinese: 热爱山间的宁静，
lines.raw: who love the peace of the mountains, | 热爱山间的宁静，

lines.english: always receive a warm welcome at St.Bernard's monastery.
lines.chinese: 总能在圣伯纳修道院受到热烈的欢迎。
lines.raw: always receive a warm welcome at St.Bernard's monastery. | 总能在圣伯纳修道院受到热烈的欢迎。
